missions.title: Double Booking on Court 3
missions.description: Two members both claim they have Court 3 reserved. Sort it out.

steps.prompt: Head to Court 3 to check on the situation.
Talk to Mrs. Wellington about the reservation.
Talk to Kevin about his booking.
Decide how to resolve the double booking.

choices.label: Check the schedule
choices.result: Mrs. Wellington had the earlier booking. Kevin understands.

choices.label: Offer Kevin Court 5
choices.result: Kevin is happy with Court 5. Mrs. Wellington is pleased you sided with her.

choices.label: Suggest they share the court
choices.result: They awkwardly agree. Neither is thrilled but it works.

missions.title: Towel Delivery
missions.description: Fresh towels need to go to Court 4.

steps.prompt: Pick up towels from the pro shop.
Deliver the towels to Court 4.

missions.title: Ball Hopper Retrieval
missions.description: Pick up the ball hopper from the garden shed and bring it to Court 2.

steps.prompt: Pick up the ball hopper from the garden area.
Deliver the ball hopper to Court 2.

missions.title: Patio Dispute
missions.description: Two members are arguing over a table at the patio. De-escalate the situation.

steps.prompt: Head to the clubhouse patio.
Talk to Chad about what happened.
Get Diane's side of the story.
How do you handle this?

choices.label: Find a compromise
choices.result: You suggest they share the large table. Both reluctantly agree.

choices.label: Side with the longer member
choices.result: Diane gets the table. Chad storms off but gets over it.

choices.label: Distract them both
choices.result: You mention the pro shop has new gear. They both forget the argument.

missions.title: Water Delivery
missions.description: Bring water bottles to the patio area.

steps.prompt: Grab water bottles from the pro shop.
Deliver water bottles to the patio.

missions.title: Wrong Court Mix-up
missions.description: A member is playing on the wrong court. Redirect them politely.

steps.prompt: Talk to Priya about which court she's on.
Help Priya find the right court.

choices.label: Walk her to the correct court
choices.result: You escort Priya to Court 1. She's grateful for the help.

choices.label: Give directions
choices.result: You point her the right way. She thanks you and heads off.

choices.label: Let her stay where she is
choices.result: The court's free anyway, so why not? Priya is relieved.

missions.title: Lost Racket
missions.description: Someone left a racket at Court 1. Return it to the pro shop.

steps.prompt: Pick up the forgotten racket at Court 1.
Return the racket to the pro shop.

missions.title: Noise Complaint
missions.description: A member is complaining about noise from the adjacent court.

steps.prompt: Listen to Diane's noise complaint.
Check on the noise at Court 2.
Ask Tommy to keep it down.
Resolve the noise situation.

choices.label: Ask Tommy to tone it down
choices.result: Tommy apologizes and keeps it down. Diane is satisfied.

choices.label: Offer Diane a quieter court
choices.result: You move Diane to Court 5. Everyone's happy.

choices.label: Explain it's a public space
choices.result: Diane grumbles but accepts it. Tommy feels vindicated.

missions.title: Groom the Clay Courts
missions.description: All three clay courts need grooming before the afternoon matches. Grab the drag brush and sweep them.

steps.prompt: Talk to Hank about court grooming.
Go to the equipment shed to attach the drag brush.
Drive onto the clay courts with the brush attached and groom all three surfaces. Start at the fence and work in!
Report back to Hank.

missions.title: Quick Court Sweep
missions.description: The clay courts need a quick touch-up. Hank says to focus on the heavy traffic areas.

steps.prompt: Get the drag brush from the equipment shed.
Groom the clay courts. Don't forget to swap coolers and empty trash while you're at it!

missions.title: Morning Court Prep
missions.description: All three clay courts need grooming before the morning session. Hank's counting on you.

steps.prompt: Check in with Hank about the morning prep.
Pick up the drag brush from the equipment shed.
Groom all three clay courts. Fence perimeter first, then near the nets, then fill in!
Let Hank know the courts are done.

reservation_dispute_1.speaker: Mrs. Wellington
reservation_dispute_1.text: I have had this court reserved for WEEKS. And now this person just walks on?

reservation_dispute_1.speaker: Mrs. Wellington
reservation_dispute_1.text: Check the schedule. You'll see I'm right.

reservation_dispute_2.speaker: Kevin Park
reservation_dispute_2.text: Oh no, am I on the wrong court? The app said Court 3...

reservation_dispute_2.speaker: Kevin Park
reservation_dispute_2.text: I'm so sorry, I'm still figuring out how this place works.

patio_argument_1.speaker: Chad Blake
patio_argument_1.text: Bro, I was literally sitting here first. I went to grab a drink for TWO seconds.

patio_argument_1.speaker: Chad Blake
patio_argument_1.text: Tell her this is my table.

patio_argument_2.speaker: Diane Ross
patio_argument_2.text: This young man abandoned his table. I sat down. That's how it works.

patio_argument_2.speaker: Diane Ross
patio_argument_2.text: I've been a member here since before he was born.

wrong_court_1.speaker: Priya Sharma
wrong_court_1.text: Hey! So I signed up for Court 1 but... I think I'm on Court 3?

wrong_court_1.speaker: Priya Sharma
wrong_court_1.text: All these courts look the same to me! Is this the clay one? What's clay?

noise_complaint_1.speaker: Diane Ross
noise_complaint_1.text: Do you HEAR that racket? No pun intended.

noise_complaint_1.speaker: Diane Ross
noise_complaint_1.text: That person on Court 2 is grunting like a wild animal. Handle it.

noise_complaint_2.speaker: Tommy Chen
noise_complaint_2.text: Oh man, was I being loud? I get into the zone sometimes!

noise_complaint_2.speaker: Tommy Chen
noise_complaint_2.text: My bad, my bad. What do you think I should do?

groom_intro_1.speaker: Hank Morris
groom_intro_1.text: Good, you're here. All three clay courts have been getting hammered — slides, divots, the works.

groom_intro_1.speaker: Hank Morris
groom_intro_1.text: Head to the equipment shed and hook up the drag brush. Then start at the fence perimeter and work your way in.

groom_intro_1.speaker: Hank Morris
groom_intro_1.text: After the perimeter, sweep close to the nets on each court. Then fill in the middles. Don't forget to swap the coolers and check the trash bins between courts!

groom_complete_1.speaker: Hank Morris
groom_complete_1.text: Let me take a look... nice work out there. All three courts look great.

groom_complete_1.speaker: Hank Morris
groom_complete_1.text: Keep it up and you'll be running the grounds crew in no time.

morning_prep_1.speaker: Hank Morris
morning_prep_1.text: Big morning ahead — all three clay courts need grooming before the 9 AM group.

morning_prep_1.speaker: Hank Morris
morning_prep_1.text: Grab the brush, start at the fence line, and sweep your way in toward the nets. Remember to check the coolers and trash between courts.

morning_prep_1.speaker: Hank Morris
morning_prep_1.text: I'll be checking your work when you're done, so make it count!

morning_prep_done.speaker: Hank Morris
morning_prep_done.text: All three courts done? Let me see...

morning_prep_done.speaker: Hank Morris
morning_prep_done.text: Looking sharp! The members are going to love playing on that surface today. Good job.
